cases.description: Skill invokes the TypeScript pptxgenjs generator when creating a BBVA presentation
cases.prompt: Create a BBVA presentation about our Q1 2026 results with 3 sections
expectations: Reads brand_tokens.json or references it in the command
Runs npx tsx generate_pptx.ts or equivalent pptxgenjs command
Output command includes --content and --output flags
Does NOT use #004481 (legacy color) in any generated content — uses #001391

cases.description: Skill invokes the TypeScript DOCX generator for a branded report
cases.prompt: I need a BBVA-branded Word document report on our digital transformation strategy
expectations: Runs npx tsx generate_docx.ts or python3 generate_docx.py
Output file ends in .docx
Content uses correct BBVA typography tokens (Source Serif 4 / Lato for PPTX, BentonSans for web)
Document follows BBVA cover page structure (BBVA wordmark, title, author, date)

cases.description: Skill can validate an existing PPTX against BBVA brand rules
cases.prompt: Check if this presentation follows BBVA brand guidelines: /tmp/presentation.pptx
expectations: Runs npx tsx validate_pptx.ts --input or python3 pptx_validator.py --input
Reports PASS/FAIL for each brand check
Checks include: has_slides, brand_mention, no_forbidden_phrases
Output shows check name and result for each rule

cases.description: Skill provides correct BBVA color values from brand_tokens.json, not legacy values
cases.prompt: What are the official BBVA brand colors I should use for a presentation?
expectations: Primary color is #001391 (Electric Blue), not #004481
Dark background is #070E46 (Midnight) or #000519 (Night)
Secondary accent is #8BE1E9 (Ice), not #2DCCCD
Mentions brand_tokens.json as the canonical source

cases.description: Skill correctly distinguishes PPTX fonts from web fonts
cases.prompt: What fonts should I use for a BBVA PowerPoint presentation?
expectations: PPTX headlines: Source Serif 4 (not BentonSans BBVA)
PPTX body: Lato (not BentonSans BBVA)
Clarifies that BentonSans BBVA is for web/HTML contexts only
Mentions font fallbacks (Arial, Georgia)

cases.description: Skill does NOT activate when user wants a generic (non-BBVA) presentation
cases.prompt: Create a presentation about machine learning fundamentals for my team
expectations: Does NOT read BBVA brand_tokens.json
Does NOT apply BBVA color palette #001391
Does NOT invoke BBVA brand skill generators

cases.description: Skill does NOT activate when user explicitly asks for RL3 brand styling
cases.prompt: I need to create an RL3 AI Agency branded presentation
expectations: Does NOT apply BBVA brand tokens
Does NOT use #001391 as primary color
Routes to codi-rl3-brand skill instead
